chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No.D-6138 of 2024 CP No.D-6139 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For hearing of CMA No.27219/2024. 2. For hearing of Main Case. 17.12.2024 Mr. Ghulam Haider Shaikh, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Jam Zeeshan Ali, advocate for the respondent. Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. The Petitions involved a common grievance i.e. denial of delay detention certificate. It is jointly submitted that recourse in such regard is available to the petitioner per Section 195 of the Customs Act, 1969. Learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petitioner will file the relevant representation application in pursuance of the aforementioned provision. Learned counsel for the respondent-department states that upon receipt of the application, the same shall be proceeded with expeditiously and determined vide a speaking order after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. It is jointly submitted that Petitions may be disposed of accordingly. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE M.Khan
